meta.title: OrdaCash Lending - Fast Online Loans
meta.description: OrdaCash provides fast, transparent, and secure online loan services for borrowers in the Philippines.
hero.description: OrdaCash provides efficient, transparent, and secure personal loan solutions with a simple mobile application process and fast approval experience.
regulation.title: Authorized & Regulated
regulation.description: Operated by a lending institution approved and regulated in the Philippines, with a focus on responsible service and data protection.
advantages.title: Why millions trust OrdaCash
advantages.description: Professional lending, considerate service, and clear digital workflows for everyday financial needs.
advantages.securityText: Encrypted systems help safeguard personal information and payment details throughout the process.
advantages.speedText: Complete your application online and receive review results quickly after submission.
advantages.transparentText: Simple steps, visible terms, and practical service guidance before you confirm an application.
steps.title: How it works
steps.description: Start from your phone, complete the required information, and track your loan status in the app.
steps.oneText: Install the OrdaCash app, create your account, and verify your mobile number to begin.
steps.twoText: Fill in the loan form, provide valid identification, and add your receiving account details.
steps.threeText: The system reviews your application and keeps you updated on approval and disbursement status.
loanStrip.title: Designed for quick, practical personal financing
loanStrip.description: Use the app to check your available amount, repayment options, and application progress in one place.
stories.title: Customer stories
stories.description: Clear steps and mobile access make it easier to handle unexpected expenses with confidence.
stories.mariaText: The application was direct and easy to follow. I liked seeing each step in the app.
stories.joseText: The review process was quick, and the account page made the loan status simple to check.
stories.anaText: Helpful for urgent needs. The interface feels clean and the repayment details are easy to find.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Quick answers for common application, approval, and repayment questions.
faq.q1: What conditions do I need to meet?
faq.a1: You should be at least 18 years old, have valid identification, a receiving account, and a stable income source.
faq.q2: How long does approval usually take?
faq.a2: Many applications can be reviewed quickly after submission. Additional verification may take longer.
faq.q3: How can I check my loan status?
faq.a3: Log in to the app and review your account or repayment page for the latest order information.
download.title: Download OrdaCash and apply from your phone
download.description: Fast application, secure verification, and easy loan management for borrowers in the Philippines.
footer.address: 19th Floor, Sapphire Rd, Ortigas Center, Barangay San Antonio, Pasig City.
footer.complianceText: PSEC Registration No. CS201917309 | Certificate of Authority No. 3136
